name: TestTiFlashFTSIndexJoin
cases: explain format='brief' select * from files WHERE file_id IN (SELECT file_id FROM file_chunks c WHERE fts_match_word('hello', c.body) ORDER BY fts_match_word('hello', c.body) DESC LIMIT 5)
